'''Fondor City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the planet [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]]. [[Creed Mitsun]] lived there. Renowned for its vices, Fondor City was a common recreational destination for off-duty [[Fondorian]] workers.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
